info.description: API for Managing Institutes and Schools.
info.title: School Management API

get.description: Returns all activity log entries for the authenticated user's institute.

post.description: Creates one or more answers for the caller's institute.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more answers by UUID.

get.description: Returns all answers belonging to the given question.

post.description: Sends an invitation email to a new user to join the caller's institute. Requires authentication.
Sends a one-time magic-link to the user's email for passwordless login.
Validates an invitation magic-link token and returns session credentials.
Validates the one-time magic-link token and returns a session object on success.

get.description: Returns all cohorts belonging to the authenticated user's school.

post.description: Creates one or more cohorts under the caller's school.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more cohorts by UUID.

get.description: Returns a single cohort by UUID.
Returns all education systems available.

post.description: Creates one or more education systems.

requestBody.description: Array of education systems to create

delete.description: Deletes one or more education systems by UUID.

get.description: Returns an education system by its UUID.

put.description: Updates an existing exam session's date/time details.

post.description: Creates one or more exam sessions. Date must be YYYY-MM-DD; start_time/end_time must be RFC3339.

requestBody.description: Array of exam sessions to create

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more exam sessions by UUID.

get.description: Returns all sessions belonging to the given exam.
Returns a single exam session by UUID.
Returns all exams belonging to the authenticated user's institute.

post.description: Creates one or more exams for the caller's institute.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more exams by UUID.

get.description: Returns a single exam by UUID.
Returns all grade ranges available.

post.description: Creates one or more grade ranges for the caller's institute.

requestBody.description: Array of grade ranges to create

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more grade ranges by UUID.

post.description: Links guardians to students within the caller's school.

delete.description: Removes the link between a guardian and a student.

get.description: Returns all guardian-student links for the given guardian UUID.
Returns all pending and accepted invitations for the caller's school.
Returns the authenticated user's profile including institute and school context.

post.description: Creates one or more questions for the caller's institute.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more questions by UUID.

get.description: Returns all questions belonging to the given topic.
Returns a single question by UUID.
Returns school users for the caller's school. Supports filtering by search term and role, with pagination.

post.description: Creates one or more schools under the caller's institute.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a school by UUID path parameter.

get.description: Returns all schools belonging to the authenticated user's institute.
Returns a school record by UUID.

post.description: Creates one or more subjects for the caller's institute.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more subjects by UUID.

get.description: Returns all subjects belonging to the given year group.
Returns a single subject by UUID.

post.description: Creates one or more topics for the caller's institute.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more topics by UUID.

get.description: Returns all topics belonging to the given subject.
Returns a single topic by UUID.

put.description: Updates basic profile fields (first name, last name, phone) for a user.

get.description: Returns a user record for the given UUID.

apperror.ErrorResponse.description: Standard error envelope returned on failure.
